entries.text: Music is sounds put together in a pattern. People make music with voices or instruments. Music can be fast or slow, loud or quiet. Listening to music or making it can make you feel happy or calm.
Instruments are things we use to make music. A guitar and piano have strings. A drum you hit. A flute you blow. You can start with something simple like a shaker or a small keyboard.
question_hints: How do you play a drum

entries.text: Singing is using your voice to make music. You can sing alone or with others. Songs have words and a tune. Singing can be fun and it can help you feel better. There is no wrong way to enjoy singing.

Art is making something that looks or feels nice: a picture, a sculpture, or a collage. Colours can be mixed: red and yellow make orange; blue and yellow make green. You can use crayons, paint, or pencils.
question_hints: What do red and yellow make

entries.text: Drawing is making pictures with lines. You can draw with a pencil, pen, or crayon. You can draw people, animals, or things you imagine. There is no right or wrong; just try and have fun.
question_hints: What do we use to draw

entries.text: Dance is moving your body to music. You can jump, spin, or sway. Dancing is a way to have fun and use your energy. You can dance alone or with friends. Everyone can dance in their own way.
